name: ASTI Holdings Limited
summary: ASTI Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the provision of semiconductor manufacturing services for surface mount technology components in Singapore, China, Malaysia, the Philippines, the United Kingdom, and internationally. It operates in two segments, Back-end Equipment Solutions and Technologies, and Distribution and Services. The company provides tape and reel packaging, and integrated circuit programming services to original equipment manufacturers, contract manufacturers, and component distributors. It also offers solutions and technologies in the back-end, including assembly, test, and finishing activities; and semiconductor application in consumer electronics, computer peripheral, and communication solutions. In addition, the company manufactures and distributes carrier tapes and plastic reels; and develops chip packaging and related technologies. Further, it offers equipment contract manufacturing services comprising turnkey manufacturing, assembly, and machining services for the semiconductor, medical, scientific, and precision tooling industries; trades in electronic components and computer peripherals, equipment, and materials; and acts as a commission agent, as well as engages in the property investment activities. Additionally, the company is involved in the construction of antique wooden sea boats, communication of culture, exhibition, conference activities, etc.; and development and management of a mixed-use property. ASTI Holdings Limited was incorporated in 1999 and is based in Singapore.
